About Me

I am a passionate technology professional based in Lagos, Nigeria, specializing in Logical and Physical Security Systems. With strong expertise in integrating Lenel OnGuard with Microsoft Power Platform, I focus on delivering automation solutions that drive operational efficiency.

Currently pursuing an Executive MBA in Strategic Leadership at Valar Institute, I combine technical excellence with leadership principles to deliver impactful digital transformation projects.

Featured Projects

Meal Consumption Management System

Integrated Lenel OnGuard 8.3 with Microsoft Power Platform for automated meal tracking and billing.
